aids.title: Allocation Strategies
aids.content:
First Fit: FIRST hole that fits (FAST)
Best Fit: BEST size match (LEAST waste)
Worst Fit: WORST choice (LARGEST hole)

"First is Fastest, Best is Bestest waste, Worst is... worst"

aids.title: Fragmentation Types
aids.content:
Internal: Inside partition (fixed size > process)
External: Outside, between blocks (scattered free)

Internal = Fixed partitions
External = Variable partitions

aids.title: Address Binding Times
aids.content:
1. Compile time - Absolute code
2. Load time - Relocatable code
3. Run time - Requires MMU
